did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study is a pilot study comparing morphological features of facial pigmented lesions using Line-Field Confocal Optical Coherence Tomography (LC-OCT) and Reflectance Confocal Microscopy (RCM) correlated with histopathology. The results were obtained through manual visual analysis and correlation by dermatologists. While the discussion mentions the 'ongoing development of artificial intelligence' as a future potential, the paper did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
